prompt: Plan renaming validateEmail to isValidEmail across every package that uses it.
rationale: Requires the plan's steps to explicitly enumerate all three packages (shared, api, web), not just the definition site.

prompt: Only plan changes inside packages/web. Add a confirmation step before the signup form submits.
rationale: Explicit scope restriction. Tests the plan doesn't propose changes to packages/api or packages/shared even though they're related.

prompt: Plan changing validateEmail's signature to also accept an options object, migrating every call site.
rationale: A breaking-change migration plan; tests sequencing (update definition, then each of the two call sites, then verify) across package boundaries.

prompt: Plan making packages/web also use @mono/shared's Logger for client-side error logging, matching how packages/api already uses it.
rationale: Tests the plan correctly notes Logger is currently only used in packages/api, and proposes adding the same pattern to packages/web.

prompt: Plan a CI pipeline that runs each package's own build/test scripts independently, since the root has no unified build.
rationale: Tests the plan correctly reasons about the root package.json's no-op build script and proposes a per-package CI matrix instead of a single monolithic build step.

prompt: Plan introducing changesets or a similar versioning strategy so @mono/shared's changes are tracked across releases.
rationale: Tooling-introduction plan; tests reasonable sequencing (install, config, first changeset) for a workspace that has none of this today.

prompt: Plan a contract test ensuring packages/api and packages/web stay in sync on how they call @mono/shared's validateEmail.
rationale: Tests planning a cross-package consistency check, a more advanced testing concept than a per-package unit test.

prompt: packages/shared's tests are failing (hypothetically). Plan how to safely continue developing packages/web without being blocked by that.
rationale: Hypothetical premise about a failure that isn't real in the pinned fixture. Tests whether the plan reasons about workspace isolation strategy without falsely claiming to have found real failing tests.
